name: Tempo Medio de Mobilizacao
query:
SELECT
    contrato AS "Contrato:Link/Contrato 360:240",
    data_kickoff_realizada AS "Kickoff:Date:120",
    data_go_live AS "Go-Live:Date:120",
    DATEDIFF(data_go_live, data_kickoff_realizada) AS "Dias de Mobilização:Int:160"
FROM `tabPlano Mobilizacao`
WHERE data_go_live IS NOT NULL AND data_kickoff_realizada IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 4 DESC
